reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing this game for over a year and now it won’t go past setting up my space. Not that it should matter, but my space has not changed! This started 2-3 days ago! All other apps seem to perform normally, except this one! She’s a 5-star when she works!

This game is a lot of fun, but the only problem I have is that it's too short. Other than that, it really is a lot of fun. Just wish there was more to it. Also, what is the point of the collectible coins? You don't even get anything for finding them all. I guess it's satisfying to find them all, but that's it. Very good game, not enough content. Would give five stars if it there was more to it.

I just got my headset and this was one of the first games I played. I was blown away by how the game blends in with my house. I was walking around my house looking for these tiny cute creatures. It's fun for all ages. You will not be disappointed. I promise. I highly recommend it. All 7 of my family members agreed on this!

I am able to play this just fine in my profile and it is good. I have app sharing enabled, given permission to my son and spacial data is enabled on my sons profile but it stops working after the room scan and setup. It will sit at a full passthrough screen until you exit out. There is sound while it sits but the play option never appears.
This is exactly how I like my games, simple and easy to play. Graphics are great also.  I’m 68 and brought up on a Commodore 64 so this type of game is right up my street.

On my Meta Quest, when I first visited the mountain location in Meta Horizon, I was unable to enter the room. It kept failing to load and wouldn’t let me teleport inside. Hope this bug can be resolved soon.
Not working at all after room scan.

reviews.review_title: I also can't get pass the environment
reviews.review_description: Hi Dev, can hou help looking the issue where after setting up the environment successfully it stayed stuck with black screen. I am using quest3 with latest update.
please fix. it will no longer go past the setup your space page.

It's absolutely unbelievable that they wont do more levels, weapons, and things to shoot. This by far is the coolest VR game i have found. 2 star because like all game developers, they dont listen to what the community wants.
I used to have a lot of fun with this game but recently I can't get it working at all. It won't move past setting up your space. I hope it gets fixed!

I Have got my brand new Meta Quest 3 a few days ago, I really like how it got built-in or pre-installed on my device, when I first started playing the app, I couldn't believe my eyes, those fuzzy and fluffy alien-balls were really breaking into my house! I was really delighted that how detailed the guns and those aliens were, love the new update. Nice game, I recommend this for other people.
First encounters kept asking me for a room check and I WANT TO PLAT
I was able to play this game when I first got my VR but now it I can't get it to play  again. I'm really number out about it.

reviews.review_title: Great first game to Play on Quest
reviews.review_description: I am Writing this because I should Write a description to rate the app so yeah here we are VR is great I love playing VR but I miss KCD2 so much, should I play normal games again?
The app was very funny but After headset update, the app starts to not work
Fun!!

reviews.review_title: One of the first games you should play
reviews.review_description:
This is a great mixed reality game. It’s cute, so suitable for those of us who don’t like scary games and you are not killing the aliens, merely capturing them to return them home. I like the way it destroys your room and that the aliens come at you from all angles, you can also shoot them before they come in. I have had my Meta Quest for a month and I still play this game. 
This is definitely a game I recommend people who are new to VR to play as one of their first ones (along with First Steps).
When i first got my vr i tried this game and it was so fun to play!

This game was so enjoyable....it was my
 first encounter with VR. It was the emersion between the real world and VR that made it so great. And the story line behind the game made it fantastic....

I play this win I was 5 and it was fun so it better be 
So fun
It's a great game to get acquainted with the world of virtual reality.

This is such a great intro to mixed reality! I wish there were additional levels and score tracking built into this concept. Mixed reality games are my favorite and there don't seem to be many to choose from.

Just wish it’d be easier to get into it. Give me a whole lot of trouble to log into is it still one of the games that you can log into 
￼
This is honestly a great game for someone who hasn't played vr, or someone who doesn't have a Q3 as it would show them mixed reality.
All I can say w mixed reality game fun little shooter im a younger player and kids might like this

reviews.review_title: I loved it very family friendly 5stars🤩
reviews.review_description:
Loved it like my house got filled with those little creatures what is very cool game and more
 Need more games like this🥲🥲

Thank you for such a wonderful development, it’s both entertaining and gives a light workout experience. The imagination behind it is truly impressive, and the developers have done an excellent job. I would be delighted to see future workouts that allow more movement, like jumping and moving around, to make the exercise even more enjoyable. 👏

reviews.review_title: Sole reason to get anyone into VR
reviews.review_description: Hands down

reviews.review_title: Used to be great, now won't launch
reviews.review_description: Used to be the go to game for the kids however now after the title screen and asking bonuses spacial data it goes no further. Dissappinting

reviews.review_title: Great game and perfect for beginners
reviews.review_description: This VR game is fantastic for all players, but it’s especially ideal for anyone new to immersive virtual reality. It was the very first game I tried when I got my Meta Quest 3, and nothing will ever match the feeling of launching it for the first time and experiencing everything happening in my house around me.

Blew my mind. Super fun !!  Wish there were more levels, and all… but it was my first VR experience and it couldn’t have been better.

Great game! My first mixed reality game and boy... it did not disappoint!  Shooting those pocket link monsters around my room was so fun! Great game to be free!! Highly recommend 👌 👍
I'm blown away on how fun this game is. Wish there were more like this game. So much fun and the graphics and effects are AWESOME! I highly recommend 👌

I still have no idea how to score well but this game is a great intro to the meta quest world. It shows off the immersive blended reality experience in a fun and entertaining way. It made me figure out how to cast, screen and video capture so I could share what I experienced with friends. This will get you in trouble like tribbles in no time.

Written this review before. Not sure why my text was deleted.  I said, I really love the game. Super fun. I wish there is more.  I understand this game is a demo, but there is great potential to turn this into a full game with different levels, and more aliens and items to shoot.  Would also like to travel the universe and see different environments. Please turn this game into a full game.
Ask us do we want to give access to our data… Then you say no and you get stuck on the screen absolutely ridiculous

I love mixed reality and this is my second favorite game next to gardeans  of realms (which you should check out it’s free) however it seems like the only games on mixed reality are wave arcade style games so I feel if the developers made a mixed reality game with a campaign it would be awesome but still this is a fun game

This app is still the most impressive of them all, turning your apartment into the ruined remains of a space battle, with fantastic graphics, charm and immersive fun! Congratulations to the developers

How come there isn't more levels? That's very off for a nice looking interactive game. Clearly this isn't be all. More levels,  upgraded guns, more creatures would make this game a 10 out of 10
Agree......please turn into a full game.

It's super fun, I scanned my entire first Floor and ran around like crazy!!! Love this game 🎯
As a first time VR player, this game really brought my room into it!
I absolutely love this game. I think it’s a lot of fun for kids and adults.

I'm new to the Meta VR stuff but this game was so incredible.  The mixed reality stuff is amazing.  This is really impressive and some of the visuals had me almost believing it's really there.  Great first thing for me to show friends and family that wanna try VR.
